headline: 影视新片蓄势待发，暑期档预热
headlineEn: New Films Gearing Up for Summer Season
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：暑期档预热中，多部新片即将上映，包括《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》和《奥德赛》等。热门趋势以《痴迷》和《福尔摩斯小姐3》领跑。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Summer season heats up with upcoming releases like 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' and 'The Odyssey'. Top trends are led by 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3'.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档2027年，粉丝期待值飙升
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' set for 2027, fan anticipation soars

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》发布先导海报，史诗冒险即将启程
industryHighlights.en: 'The Odyssey' releases teaser poster, epic adventure begins

industryHighlights.text: 《海洋奇缘：启航》本周热度持续，动画续集备受关注
industryHighlights.en: 'Moana: Setting Sail' remains trending this week, animated sequel draws attention
